creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Mon, Feb 21, 2000 at 10:02:22AM -0600, obonilla@fisicc-ufm.edu wrote:
> 	kmp3 fails to compile with either qt-1.42 or qt-2.02

Known problem. I've already fixed it on my website.
See http://www.psn.net/~will/qtkde/. I'm going to re-review this patch
(I believe someone else committed fixes to make it compile on -current
since I made that patch) and retest them.

> >Fix:
> 	I no longer use the KDE and don't have the time/space to 
> 	fix this port. I request someone else takes over the
> 	Maintenance of this port.

I'll take it when I send in the patches.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
